faqs.question: What does your $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and plumbing fixtures, identification of breeding sites, professional bio-enzymatic treatment to eliminate larvae and organic buildup, mechanical cleaning when needed, and a follow-up visit if necessary. The price varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Why are drain flies common in South Jamaica properties?
faqs.answer: South Jamaica has many older buildings with aging plumbing systems where organic matter accumulates in drains, creating ideal breeding grounds for drain flies. High humidity, infrequent drain cleaning, and the dense urban environment all contribute to drain fly problems in both residential and commercial properties throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: How can I prevent drain flies from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: After our treatment, maintain drains by regularly flushing with hot water, using enzymatic drain cleaners monthly, ensuring proper drain trap function, and fixing any slow-draining fixtures promptly. Our technicians will provide specific maintenance recommendations for your South Jamaica property to prevent future infestations.
